rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 14, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION, COALITION FOR, SAN FRANCISCO ASSOCIATION OF REALTORS' Motion For Writ Of Mandate And Injunctive And Declaratory Relief: Continued to July 16, 2014 on Court's own motion. = (501/LKS) LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: DENISE BATTISTA VS. NORTHPOINT LAND LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complt; Notice
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 14, 2014, Line 2: PLAINTIFF DENISE BATTISTA's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint: GRANTED. Where the sufficiency of the proposed amendment is a novel question almost certain to be tested in an appellate court, the preferable practice is to permit the amendment and allow the parties to test its legal sufficiency by demurrer or other appropriate motion. (California Casualty Gen. Ins. Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1985) 173 Cal.App.3d 274, 281.) Moreover, ordinarily, the judge will not consider the validity of the proposed amended pleading in deciding whether to grant leave to amend; rather, after leave is granted, the opposing party will have the opportunity to attack the validity of the amended pleading. (Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup.Ct. (Marker, U.S.A.) (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.) Finally, Defendants have not established that they will be unduly prejudiced by Plaintiff's proposed amendment. (501/LKS) LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: DOROTHY MARTINEZ et al VS. MAIRE DWAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft'S Responses To Discovery, For An Order Establishing Admissions, And Req. For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 14, 2014, Line 5: PLAINTIFFS DOROTHY MARTINEZ, MICHAEL CORTEZ and RONNEY RENDON'S Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Discovery, For An Order Establishing Admissions, And Request For Sanctions: GRANTED. Defendant shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Demand for Production within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $975. (501/LKS) LATE TENTATIVE
